summary: Tested HB Eid ul Adha (Expo SDK 54 + FastAPI) backend and frontend end-to-end. All 10 backend API tests passed (content endpoints, Aladhan proxies for prayer-times and qibla). Frontend flows verified: splash → tabs redirect, Home (greeting, Eid countdown showing 1 day, 7 quick access, featured Sunnah, daily hadith), Sunnah list with expand-to-show-translations, Duain 6 categories + detail with favorite/share, Takbeer counter (increment, reset, persistence across reload), Qurbani 4 sub-tabs switching, More menu with all 6 items, Tasbeeh present, Settings language switch to Urdu re-renders UI in Urdu/RTL and persists. No critical issues. Only warnings: React Native Web deprecation warnings (shadow*, textShadow*, pointerEvents) that originate from reanimated/RNW internals, not blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Console shows 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'textShadow*' deprecated, and props.pointerEvents deprecated. These come from RNW/reanimated wrappers and shadow styles used in /app/frontend/src/constants/theme.ts (Shadows.*). Not blocking but should migrate to boxShadow/textShadow where defined locally.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate locally defined shadow* / textShadow* style props (e.g., Shadows constants and heroNumber.textShadowColor) to boxShadow / textShadow to remove RNW deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses sync `requests` library inside async FastAPI endpoints (/api/prayer-times, /api/qibla). Works but blocks the event loop; consider httpx.AsyncClient for production.

Logger is defined after the first usage location (logger.error in prayer_times catch block is fine because basicConfig + logger init run at module load before any request; but ordering is fragile - move logger init above endpoint definitions).
CORS is wide-open (allow_origins=['*']) — acceptable for MVP guest-mode app but should be tightened pre-prod.
MongoDB client is instantiated but never used; harmless but adds startup overhead.
Frontend pickTranslation + i18n flow tested across EN/UR — Arabic locale not exercised in UI but lang-ar testID exists.
seed_data_creation: None. Content is static via content_data.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend external URL: https://islamic-sunnah.preview.emergentagent.com with /api prefix. Run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hb_eid_api.py for regression. testID conventions: sunnah-item-{id}, dua-{id}, dua-fav-{id}, dua-share-{id}, takbeer-counter-button, takbeer-count, takbeer-reset-button, qurbani-tab-{rules|animal|method|duas}, more-{sunnah|prayer-times|qibla|tasbeeh|settings|about}, lang-{en|ur|ar}, home-quick-{sunnah|qurbani|takbeer|duain|prayer|qibla|tasbeeh}, home-days-left. Splash auto-redirects after ~2.6s; allow ~4s settle after navigation.
